https://quickidearecipes.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/Chef-Molly.png 1024w" data-sizes="(max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px" /><figcaption id="caption-attachment-2083" class="wp-caption-text">Molly in her element, welcoming, confident, and ready to bake</figcaption></figure><p><strong data-start="132" data-end="152">Molly Harrington</strong><br data-start="152" data-end="155" />Dessert Specialist | Asheville, NC<br data-start="189" data-end="192" data-is-only-node="" />Baker of sweet memories and bold flavors. From nostalgic pies to playful twists on classics, I help home cooks turn simple ingredients into unforgettable treats. Join me in the kitchen, flour on your shirt, joy in your heart, and something delicious always on the way.</p><p><a class="button" href="https://www.quickidearecipes.com/about-me/">Learn more</a></p></div></aside><aside id="mc4wp_form_widget-1" class="widget inner-padding widget_mc4wp_form_widget"><h2 class="widget-title">Newsletter</h2></aside></div></div></div></div><div class="site-footer footer-bar-active footer-bar-align-right"><footer class="site-info" aria-label="Site"  itemtype="https://schema.org/WPFooter" itemscope><div class="inside-site-info grid-container"><div class="footer-bar"><aside id="nav_menu-5" class="widget inner-padding widget_nav_menu"><h2 class="widget-title">Footer</h2><div class="menu-footer-container"><ul id="menu-footer" class="menu"><li id="menu-item-2077" class="menu-item menu-item-type-post_type menu-item-object-page menu-item-2077"><a href="https://quickidearecipes.com/about-me/">About me</a></li><li id="menu-item-2029" class="menu-item menu-item-type-post_type menu-item-object-page menu-item-2029"><a href="https://quickidearecipes.com/contact-us/">Contact Us</a></li><li id="menu-item-2031" class="menu-item menu-item-type-post_type menu-item-object-page menu-item-2031"><a href="https://quickidearecipes.com/privacy-policy/">Privacy Policy</a></li><li id="menu-item-2032" class="menu-item menu-item-type-post_type menu-item-object-page menu-item-2032"><a href="https://quickidearecipes.com/terms-of-service/">Terms of service</a></li><li id="menu-item-2033" class="menu-item menu-item-type-post_type menu-item-object-page menu-item-2033"><a href="https://quickidearecipes.com/disclaimer/">Disclaimer</a></li></ul></div></aside></div><div class="copyright-bar">
